content:
Here's the JSON file with the extracted locations:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Serralunga d'Alba",
    "full_address": "Serralunga d'Alba, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy",
    "image": "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a3/Serralunga_d%27Alba_panorama.jpg/1200px-Serralunga_d%27Alba_panorama.jpg",
    "order": 1
  },
  {
    "name": "Piedmont",
    "full_address": "Piedmont, Italy",
    "image": "https://www.turismotorino.org/sites/default/files/styles/fullwidth_gallery/public/2021-10/DSCF0087_0.jpg?itok=9z37qY-o",
    "order": 2
  }
]
```

Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Serralunga d'Alba",
    "full_address": "Serralunga d'Alba, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy",
    "image": "https://www.turismoinlanga.it/wp-content/uploads/2016/07/serralunga-dAlba.jpg",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```
